rows.label: tev056601_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev056601_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Moimoi about Nopon technology.

rows.label: tev056601_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev056601_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Moimoi about recent developments.

rows.label: tev056601_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Moimoi about recent developments.

rows.label: tev056601_SEL1011
rows.name:
Ask Moimoi what the Nopon
did during the attack.

rows.label: tev056601_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Moimoi about recent developments.

rows.label: tev056601_SEL1031
rows.name:
Ask Moimoi what he did
during the attack.

rows.label: tev056601_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Moimoi about recent developments.

rows.label: tev056601_SEL3021
rows.name: Ask Moimoi about recent developments.

rows.label: tev056601_SEL4021
rows.name: Ask Moimoi about recent developments.

rows.label: tev056601_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Moimoi what he will do now.

rows.label: tev056601_MSG0001
rows.name:
Not easy to survive on harsh planet like
Mira, so Moimoi dedicate much of his life
to cultivating ancestral Nopon technology.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG0002
rows.name:
Technology of human friends not too shabby
either, but Moimoi and Nopon crew are true
champions of technological arena![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG0003
rows.name:
...What? Earth friend does not believe Moimoi?
Mo! Friend should check out selection of wares
at Nopon Commerce Guild before running mouth![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG0004
rows.name:
Every super cool weapon on sale
is packed to brim with
crickly-crackly thermal energy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG0005
rows.name:
Monsters like jacul HATE the crickly-crackly, so
Nopon weapon really hits spot. Friend will be
thanking Nopon everywhere with tears in eyes![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG0010
rows.name:
Informant Chacha told Moimoi all
about city. That is why Moimoi came.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG0011
rows.name:
But many alien races and
incredible inventions of city
STILL blew tuft off Moimoi![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG0012
rows.name:
In Armory Alley, friend can easily buy
all sorts of amazing machines and junk![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG0013
rows.name:
Moimoi is going to get big brotherpon
Muimui to buy LOTS of things for research.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG0018
rows.name:
Moimoi and brotherpon Muimui are
very first Nopon to join BLADE![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG0019
rows.name:
Pretty amazing, right? Want
to shake hand of hero?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG0020
rows.name:
Moimoi has made many inventions and none
have been hits. But friend just wait![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG0021
rows.name:
Next invention is going to be knock out of
park for BLADE adventurers. Moimoi want to
make life easier for friends everywhere![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG1001
rows.name:
Moimoi heard really loud BANG
BANG noise and came running.
Thought there might be fireworks.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG1002
rows.name:
But sound was actually just Growth
machines trying to blow up city.
Friends were totally surrounded![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG1003
rows.name:
Moimoi and Muimui watched whole shebang
from relative safety of mountaintop.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG1004
rows.name:
Then, after surprising victory of
friends, Moimoi and Muimui ran onto
battlefield and looted Growth wreckage![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG1005
rows.name:
Many thanks, by the way. Hard work of
friend helped Moimoi and Muimui get hands
on lots of supplies for inventions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG1010
rows.name:
Muimui is doing great with new job!
Every now and then Moimoi gets message.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG1011
rows.name:
Brotherpon still not manage to
find Sword of Legendaryness...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG1012
rows.name:
But Muimui did stumble on rare flower
called sona herb at Northpointe Cove![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG1013
rows.name:
Moimoi very proud of brother for
turning into such kick-butt BLADE.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG1018
rows.name:
Moimoi is also BLADE, and cannot simply
stand in shadow of brotherpon forever![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG1019
rows.name:
So Moimoi choose to gear up, get out there,
and show Growth baddies who is boss![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG1020
rows.name:
Unfortunately, three seconds into battle,
big giant controlled by Riiz kicked Moimoi
out of city like little furry soccer ball.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG1021
rows.name:
Moimoi had horrible time out there
while waiting for bruises and sprains
and muscle pain to heal...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG1022
rows.name:
If only Moimoi had some kind of hyper armor
capable of withstanding any attack... MEEEEEEEEEHHHH!
Moimoi just stumble on new invention![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG2001
rows.name:
Moimoi decided to take closer
look at legendary toy sword
brought home by brotherpon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG2002
rows.name:
Turn out there is button in middle that
causes crest on sword to make flashies![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG2003
rows.name:
...Market price still very low, but it look
so cool! Great Nopon ancestors think of
everything when designing official merchandise.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG3001
rows.name:
Moimoi decided to try cleaning
ears with Earwax- Remover of
Legendaryness brotherpon found.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG3002
rows.name:
SOOOOOO GOOOOOOD! Meeeeeh... Like ears
died and went off to clean-ear heaven.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG3003
rows.name:
Talk about masterwork of engineering!
Great ancestors really knew what Nopon
look for in ear-hygiene product.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG3004
rows.name:
Might be while before Sword of Legendaryness
turns up, so Moimoi definitely considering
mass-producing earwax-remover instead.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG3005
rows.name:
Every Nopon in Nopondom will
want one! Moimoi going to make
credits hand over fist.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG4001
rows.name:
Friend must wage epic deadly
battle to get back real bodies.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG4002
rows.name:
Moimoi and brotherpon will stay in
city and keep everyone nice and safe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG4003
rows.name:
Do not worry! Moimoi and
Muimui are BLADE veterans.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG4004
rows.name:
No problem laying waste to
mob of blatta or terebra.
Moimoi will destroy them all![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG4005
rows.name:
...Hmm? What about Bias? Friend must be
kidding! Moimoi not have death wish or
something. Moimoi not want to get EATEN![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG4010
rows.name:
Moimoi just about ready to go forward with
plan to mass-produce Earwax-Remover of
Legendaryness that brotherpon Muimui find.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG4011
rows.name:
When Moimoi provide prototype sample to
Chacha, it must have felt good, because
Chacha shout "Hoy!" at top of lungs![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG4012
rows.name:
Very possible earwax-remover
will become smash hit and sell
like wildfire among Nopon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG4013
rows.name:
Moimoi need to make it up to brotherpon
for eating every last scrap of food...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG4014
rows.name:
So once Moimoi basically printing money,
Moimoi will repay brother. No worries![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG4019
rows.name:
Guess what? Moimoi invent
special hyper armor for Nopon
that can withstand any impact.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG4020
rows.name:
Once finer details are worked out, Moimoi
planning to put hyper armor on and go
help brother Muimui with missions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG4021
rows.name:
Moimoi has big plans to bust tuft as
BLADE and achieve ultimate Collepedian
dream of filling up entire Collepedia.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_MSG4022
rows.name:
How does Collepedia of friend look at moment?
Friend seems pretty good at collecting, actually.
Maybe friend can give Moimoi few tips?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056601_SEL0032
rows.name:
Ask Moimoi about the battle
at the Central Life.
